CustomField.description: Indicates Non Deferred Balance Due in ledger currency
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled__c), leaseworks__Actual_Balance_Due__c, IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c), NULL, IF( leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c = 0, 0, leaseworks__Actual_Balance_Due__c* leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates Non Deferred Balance Due in ledger currency
CustomField.label: Non Deferred Balance Due (Ledger)
